reasoning: The conversion preserved content exceptionally well with shingling recall at 0.997 and a perfect LLM content score. However, a major structural defect was identified where a continuous Roman numeral list (I-X) was improperly fractured into separate lists, an H2 heading, and a plain paragraph. Based on the presence of 1 major defect, the document is routed to HUMAN_REVIEW to correct the semantic list structure.

concerns.analysis: The source document uses a continuous Roman numeral list (I through X) to organize the meeting minutes. However, the output severely fractures this structure. Items I-IV are rendered as a list on Page 1. Item V is incorrectly rendered as an H2 heading on Page 2. Item VI is incorrectly rendered as a plain paragraph on Page 2. Items VII-X are then rendered as a new list on Page 3. Converting numbered list items into plain headings and paragraphs breaks the list continuity and semantic structure.
